detail: CORRECTED after adversarial verification: this is NOT 772 lost customers. The applied customer import (40 batches, dry_run=f) recorded created=19,379, matched=592, merge_review=29, error=0. The 20,151 profile decomposes as 19,379 created + 592 phone-matched (deduped into an existing row, intentional) + 29 held for merge_review + ~151 source rows not processed by the applied batches (20,000 of 20,151 fed). sync_record customer is a clean 19,379 1:1:1 map. RISK: legacy had phone groups mapping up to 43 customers (family members sharing one number); phone-based dedup may have wrongly collapsed DISTINCT people into one. The 592 matched + 29 held + 151 unprocessed (=772) each need row-level categorization before a 100% claim.
affected_ids: 592 phone-matched (review for over-merge), 29 merge_review held, ~151 unprocessed
verified_by: adversarial agent refute:customers-short (refuted=TRUE — my original 'unexplained loss / merge_record=2' framing was wrong)

detail: Profiled legacy active orders = 1,044 (extracted 2026-06-14). Staging shows 1,054 legacy orders status=active; distinct active customers 1,042 vs 1,033 profiled (+9). +10 upward drift on the one order metric that HAS an authoritative baseline — must be explained before signoff (likely status drift between extraction and import, but unproven).

RESOLVED 2026-06-16 (live legacy access): the full order index was re-extracted, giving an authoritative source total of 20,637 DISTINCT orders (Active 1,026 / Expire 17,241 / cancel 1,863 / pending 5,941; Pause 0; 26,071 raw rows incl. live-paging overlaps). Staging holds 19,465 -> ~1,172 orders short, concentrated in expired/historical (legacy Expire 17,241 vs staging expired 11,162). Was 'unprovable'; now a quantified gap consistent with the 1,732 import errors.

Payment records for full history; FK to order clean (0 orphans); 0 paid-with-zero-amount. 8,208 legacy orders have no payment (consistent with rejected/expired never paying). No full-history payment baseline to reconcile against.

All 7 genuine legacy packages are present (MATCH). The 9 includes 2 demo plans ('Monthly Balanced Plan','Weekly Lite Plan') from the UAT seed mis-tagged origin='legacy'. Tagging nuance, not a completeness gap.

UPDATE 2026-06-16 (live legacy access): the legacy /products catalog has 1,296 products (Name EN/AR, Category, Associated Packages, Status) vs 2 in staging — a near-total catalog gap. Fully extracted this session (products.jsonl). GAP IS CLOSEABLE once imported (import gated on MIGRATION_APPLY).

9,511 addresses, exactly one per distinct customer; ~9,868 legacy customers (51%) have no address. Could be correct (many legacy customers never ordered/gave an address) or a drop. No legacy address total to reconcile.

105 staged legacy customers have no customer_phone row (cf. profile invalid_or_missing_phone=91 — not confirmed same set). Phone is the de-facto identity key used for dedup, so gaps here compound MM-03.

All findings are SQL-layer. The app read path (masking at serialization, RBAC filtering, bilingual EN/AR, API contract shape) is unverified end-to-end. Authenticated API + browser (tools/e2e-staging) BLOCKED by missing E2E_EMAIL/E2E_PASSWORD. No replay-equality (TS-E) run against the migrated dataset.
